name: The Shattered Sanctum
description: An ancient fortress built over a sacred prison. Three seals hold the Hollow King — a being of pure void. The seals are cracking. You have three paths: reinforce them, break them, or negotiate. All roads lead to the same chamber.

mainQuest.name: Seals of the Hollow King
mainQuest.description: The three ancient seals binding the Hollow King are failing. Reach the Sanctum and determine the fate of the prison — and its prisoner.

stages.description: Speak with Commander Voss at the altar on Floor 1.
Gather all three Seal Fragments across the dungeon's floors.
Descend to the Shattered Sanctum on Floor 3.
Enter the Sealing Chamber and face the Hollow King.

endings.name: The Seal Holds
endings.description: All three Seal Fragments were used to reinforce the seals before the final fight. The Hollow King is weakened. The Sanctum endures — for now.
endings.condition: flag_seals_reinforced AND flag_hollow_king_defeated AND NOT flag_dark_path_accepted

endings.name: The Void Inheritors
endings.description: The seals were broken on the Shadow Archivist's advice. The Hollow King fell, but his void-energy flowed into the victors. Power was gained. Something else was lost.

endings.name: The Old Bargain
endings.description: Three Void Runes were activated in the Sanctum. The Hollow King, recognising the ancient ritual, withdrew. No fight. An uneasy truce older than the Order itself.

sideQuests.name: Echoes of the Patrol
sideQuests.description: Three patrol markers from Commander Voss's fallen soldiers are scattered through the Outpost. Collect them and report back to Voss.
sideQuests.rewardDescription: Voss opens the armory. Iron Spear and XP bonus.

sideQuests.name: The Herbalist's Debt
sideQuests.description: Herbalist Mira needs three Glowing Mushrooms from the Fungal Warrens. Bring them to her camp on Floor 2.

sideQuests.name: The Captain's Burden
sideQuests.description: The ghost of Captain Aldric haunts the Warrens. His corrupted body is locked in the western chamber. Destroy it and set him free.
sideQuests.rewardDescription: Seal Fragment II + Captain's Badge (for Voss). Lore about the Void Rune neutral ending.

difficultyNotes: Recommended party level 4-6 for Floor 1, 7-9 for Floor 2, 10-12 for Floor 3. Boss fights are tuned for a full party of 4. The Hollow King's Phase 3 is lethal without preparation — bring Phoenix Downs and reinforced seals.
balanceWarnings: Hollow King HP/ATK may need tuning for actual party stats — test and adjust in CombatBalanceConfig
Outpost Warden may be too tanky at party level 5 — reduce HP to 110 if needed
Fungal Spider poison stacking can be brutal — ensure antidotes are findable early
